home.hero.title: Become a Verifiable Solana Builder
home.hero.subtitle: Superteam Academy transforms learning into on-chain reputation. Complete production-grade challenges, earn wallet-bound XP, and showcase verifiable credentials that signal real Solana engineering skill.
home.identityHint: Wallet is your on-chain identity. Google linking is optional for saving preferences and progress.
home.why.title: Why Superteam Academy?
home.why.subtitle: Structured learning meets verifiable on-chain progress
home.why.description: Most platforms teach theory. Superteam Academy builds engineers. Every lesson completed, every challenge solved, and every certificate issued becomes part of your public developer identity.
home.why.ecosystem: Designed as the open-source foundation for Solana developer education across Latin America and beyond.
